title: Help Centre | University of Hull
h1: How can we help you today?
meta_description: All the answers to all your questions, in one handy place. Search FAQs for study, research, accommodation, business, support and more.
headings: h2: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Don't worry, help is at hand.
text_excerpt: Help Centre | University of Hull Study Life at Hull Research Collaborate News & events Alumni About Search Search Search Main menu Toggle menu Home chevron right Help Centre How can we help you today? Applying to Hull upload Find out how to apply to Hull at all levels of study, from Undergraduate to Postgraduate Research Clearing upload Confused about Clearing? Get answers to all of your questions about the process. Visiting the University upload Answer all of your questions about visiting us, for an Open Day, Applicant Day, or any other reason Fees and funding upload Get help with all things finance and money related, including student loans and scholarships Accommodation upload Learn about moving in and out, how to apply, how to make payments and more International students upload Coming to Hull from another country? Here's everything you need to know. Student support upload Find out all about the different ways in which we can support you during your studies Graduation upload Step on to the stage with confidence – find out about dates, robing, tickets and more Services for business upload Learn how we can support your business through our different programmes and facilities Jobs at Hull upload Want to work for us? Find out more about the process for applying to work at Hull Alumni upload Learn about how you can support the University through donations, and how you can stay connected Schools and colleges upload Everything you need to know about our services for schools and colleges Accessibility on campus upload Get advice on how to find your way around our campus and what support is available Trending questions How do I apply to transfer to Hull? upload How do I apply to Hull through UCAS? upload What are the key UCAS application dates for 2026 entry? upload What happens after I apply to Hull? upload When should I apply for a postgraduate taught course? upload Are there any deadlines for transfer applications? upload When do I apply for undergraduate student finance? upload Are there entry requirements for transferring to Hull? upload Glossary “We had a seminar, a lecture and a tutorial for three different modules today, as part of our bachelors degree – and this is just our first semester...” If you have no idea what we’re talking about, it’s time to take a look at our University Glossary and get up to speed with higher education lingo. Take a look Get in touch Can't find the answer you're looking for? Don't worry, help is at hand.
